features.title: What CareTip can do for you
features.subtitleLead: Caring is Tipping! Because outstanding dedication deserves real recognition.
features.subtitleBody: A platform tailor-made for hospitality, healthcare, and service industries. With CareTip, your guests, clients, or patients can say a digital thank you more easily and intuitively than ever before. Bring genuine appreciation straight to your team!
features.f1Desc: Guests scan and tip in seconds, with no app installs and no friction.
features.f2Desc: Track tips, ratings, and goals in one place so staff stay motivated.
features.f3Desc: See team performance, trends, and activity across shifts and venues.
features.f4Desc: Trusted checkout and modern security so payments stay reliable and safe.
features.f5Desc: Live activity and notifications so you can coach and respond fast.
features.f6Desc: Manage multiple venues, locations, and tables without losing clarity.
features.momentsSubtitle: Tailored views for your entire environment. See how CareTip makes everyday life easier for guests, teams, managers, and finance.

qr.title: The QR experience
qr.subtitle: Individual design for your public presence
qr.body: Branded codes and tipping pages that blend seamlessly into your business appearance.

employee.title: Instant notifications, full transparency, and fresh motivation for every shift.
employee.body: Employees receive real-time tip updates, keep full overview of their earnings, and start every workday highly motivated.

payouts.title: Tip tracking & security
payouts.subtitle: Secure processing and transparent tip records your team can trust.
payouts.body: Fully protected processing and traceable tip records provide maximum security and reliability for your employees.

analytics.title: Full clarity in analytics
analytics.subtitle: Shift trends, top performers, and live activity, without Excel chaos.
analytics.body: Track shift development, outstanding team performance, and all activity in real time instead of fighting unclear spreadsheets.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Full flexibility for your customers: They only pay what they feel is right.
pricing.sectionTitle: True recognition is all about simplicity.
pricing.sectionSubtitle: With CareTip, you can spotlight your team's outstanding service and reward them directly. Delight your guests, boost team morale, and turn customers into loyal brand advocates.
pricing.ctaTitle: Do you have questions about CareTip?
pricing.ctaBody: Our team will guide you step-by-step through the setup, branding, and selection of the right pricing model for your service, care, or logistics sector.

howItWorks.title: The CareTip Journey
howItWorks.subtitle: Set up your account, add your team, and get started right away.
howItWorks.s1Body: Register your business workspace in minutes. Add your venue details, verify your account, and get a clean dashboard ready for locations, staff, and payouts.
howItWorks.s2Body: Invite managers and staff with email or invite codes. Assign roles, organize by location, and keep everyone connected to the right tipping permissions.
howItWorks.s3Body: Create branded QR codes for individuals, team pools, or tables. Preview designs, export print ready PDFs, and share dynamic links when you do not need print.
howItWorks.s4Title: Place QR at tables & service points
howItWorks.s4Body: Place your QR codes where your customers, patients, or relatives naturally interact: in care units, on flyers, displays, or directly on workwear. CareTip blends subtly and seamlessly into your daily operations and brand identity.
howItWorks.s5Body: Guests scan with their phone camera. No app download. They choose an amount, pay with card or wallet, and land on a clear confirmation in seconds.
howItWorks.s6Body: Staff get real-time notifications when a tip lands. They see live earnings, activity in their wallet, and confidence that great service was recognized immediately.
howItWorks.s7Body: Owners and managers monitor tips by location, shift, and team member. Analytics widgets, top performer cards, and activity feeds keep the floor and back office aligned.
howItWorks.s8Body: Every tip is recorded in CareTip with clear records for managers and staff. Businesses distribute tips on their own schedule; CareTip keeps the audit trail transparent.
howItWorks.s9Body: Higher tip participation, happier teams, and stronger guest experiences compound over time. CareTip helps you measure engagement and celebrate momentum across every location.
howItWorks.trustTitle: Trust and speed for every shift
howItWorks.trust1Body: Card data is handled by certified processors; connections use modern encryption so guest payments and business data stay protected end to end.
howItWorks.trust2Body: Web and mobile experiences stay in sync so managers and staff see updates whether they are on site or on the go.
howItWorks.ctaTitle: Ready to roll out digital tipping?
howItWorks.ctaBody: See fee tiers built for hospitality teams, from single venues to multiple location groups.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Learn how we use cookies.
cookies.whatBody: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our service.
cookies.essentialBody: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility.
cookies.performanceBody: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
cookies.functionalBody: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization.
cookies.targetingBody: These cookies are used to deliver advertisements more relevant to you and your interests.
cookies.thirdLead: We use services from trusted third-party providers that may set cookies on your device:
cookies.thirdLi0: Google Analytics: To understand how users interact with our website
cookies.thirdLi1: Payment Processors: To securely process transactions
cookies.thirdLi2: Social Media Platforms: To enable social sharing features
cookies.thirdLi3: Customer Support Tools: To provide live chat and support
cookies.manageLead: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie preferences by:
cookies.manageLi0: Browser Settings: Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies through their settings
cookies.manageLi1: Cookie Consent Tool: Use our cookie consent banner when you first visit our site
cookies.manageLi2: Opt-Out Links: Follow opt-out instructions provided by third-party services
cookies.manageNote: Note: Blocking essential cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookies.browserTitle: How to Control Cookies in Your Browser
cookies.browserChrome: Google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies and other site data
cookies.browserFirefox: Mozilla Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
cookies.browserSafari: Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
cookies.browserEdge: Microsoft Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Manage and delete cookies
cookies.retentionLead: Different cookies have different retention periods:
cookies.retentionLi0: Session Cookies: Deleted when you close your browser
cookies.retentionLi1: Persistent Cookies: Remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them
cookies.retentionLi2: Essential Cookies: Typically last for the duration of your session
cookies.retentionLi3: Analytics Cookies: Usually stored for up to 2 years
cookies.updatesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our business operations. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
cookies.footerContact: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at privacy@caretip.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Caretip, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our digital tipping platform.
privacy.s1Lead: We collect information you provide directly to us when you:
privacy.s1Li0: Create a business or employee account on Caretip
privacy.s1Li1: Process or receive digital tips through our platform
privacy.s1Li2: Link your bank account or payment method for payouts
privacy.s1Li3: Contact our support team or communicate with us
privacy.s1Li4: Participate in surveys, contests, or promotional activities
privacy.s1Foot: This may include your name, email address, phone number, business information, payment information, and tip transaction details.
privacy.s2Lead: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.s2Li0: Process digital tips and provide transparent tip records for employees
privacy.s2Li1: Provide, maintain, and improve our tipping platform
privacy.s2Li2: Generate QR codes and personalized tipping links
privacy.s2Li3: Send transaction confirmations and payout notifications
privacy.s2Li4: Provide analytics and insights to business owners
privacy.s2Li5: Respond to your comments, questions, and customer service requests
privacy.s2Li6: Prevent fraud and ensure platform security
privacy.s3Lead: We may share your information in the following situations:
privacy.s3Li0: With your consent: We'll share your information when you explicitly consent
privacy.s3Li1: Service providers: We work with third-party service providers who help us operate our platform
privacy.s3Li2: Legal requirements: We may disclose information if required by law or legal process
privacy.s3Li3: Business transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale
privacy.s3Foot: We never sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s4Body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. This includes encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s5Li0: Access, update, or delete your personal information
privacy.s5Li2: Request a copy of your data
privacy.s5Li3: Object to processing of your personal information
privacy.s5Li4: Close your account at any time
privacy.s6Body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. For more information, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.s7Body: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
privacy.s8Body: Your information may be transferred to and maintained on computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where data protection laws may differ.
privacy.s9Body: Our service is not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18.
privacy.s10Body: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date.
privacy.footerContact: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@caretip.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: These terms govern your use of Caretip's digital tipping platform for hospitality businesses, employees, and guests.
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using Caretip ("we," "us," or "the Service"), you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service. Caretip enables businesses to offer QR-based digital tipping, process payments, and route tips to employees according to your agreement, fee tier, and settings.
terms.s2Lead: You may use Caretip only if you can form a binding contract. When you register:
terms.s2Li0: You must provide accurate information for yourself or your business
terms.s2Li1: You are responsible for safeguarding your password and all activity under your account
terms.s2Li2: You must notify us promptly of unauthorized access
terms.s2Li3: Business accounts must only invite employees and issue QR codes in line with your workplace policies
terms.s3Li0: Generate and manage QR codes and tipping flows for staff or locations
terms.s3Li1: Allow guests to leave tips using supported payment methods
terms.s3Li2: Display tips, payouts, and related notifications to authorized users
terms.s3Li3: Provide analytics and reporting to businesses as described in your plan
terms.s3Foot: Features may vary by fee tier or account type. We may modify or discontinue features with reasonable notice where required by law.
terms.s4Lead: Digital tips are processed through payment partners. You agree that:
terms.s4Li0: Platform or transaction fees may apply as shown at checkout or in your business agreement
terms.s4Li1: Payout timing and methods depend on your configuration, verification status, and third-party rules
terms.s4Li2: You are responsible for taxes, reporting, and compliance related to tips and wages in your jurisdiction
terms.s4Li3: Chargebacks and payment disputes may be handled according to card network rules and our policies
terms.s5Li0: Use the Service for fraud, money laundering, or illegal activity
terms.s5Li1: Interfere with or disrupt the Service or other users
terms.s5Li2: Attempt to access data or accounts you are not authorized to use
terms.s5Li3: Misrepresent tips, identities, or business relationships
terms.s5Li4: Reverse engineer or scrape the Service except where permitted by law
terms.s6Body: Caretip's name, logo, software, and content are protected by intellectual property laws. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive license to use the Service as intended. You may not copy our materials except as allowed for normal use of the product.
terms.s7Body: We integrate with payment processors, banks, and other providers. Your use of those services may be subject to their terms. We are not responsible for third-party outages or actions outside our reasonable control.
terms.s8Body: The Service is provided "as available." To the fullest extent permitted by law, Caretip is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, or lost profits, arising from your use of tipping or payout features. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations; in those cases, our liability is limited to the maximum allowed by law.
terms.s9Body: We may suspend or terminate access for breach of these Terms, risk to the platform, or legal requirements. You may close your account according to in-product options. Certain provisions survive termination.
terms.s10Body: We may update these Terms. We will post changes here and update the "Last updated" date. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance where permitted by law.
terms.s11Body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable in the United States, without regard to conflict-of-law rules, unless otherwise required by your jurisdiction.

faq.pageSubtitle: Frequently asked questions about digital tipping with CareTip.

whatIs.title: What is CareTip?
whatIs.lead: The smart way to say thank you.
whatIs.guestsBody: they simply scan a QR code, choose the team member or pool, and pay in seconds by card or smartphone (Apple Pay/Google Pay).
whatIs.businessBody: you manage your team, create individual QR codes, and receive compliant reports for accounting, all on one central platform.
whatIs.employeesBody: the crew sees every appreciation received and tips earned transparently in their own account. That drives motivation and a strong sense of team.

items.q: Do guests need to download an app to leave a tip?
items.aBody: Guests can tip instantly from their mobile browser simply by scanning the QR code or clicking the link. No app downloads, accounts, or registrations are required for the guest tipping flow, it takes just a few seconds.

All tips are processed through fully certified, secure payment partners. CareTip records every tip with clear records for managers and staff. Businesses distribute tips on their own schedule; CareTip keeps the audit trail transparent.

items.aLead: Yes, absolutely. Security is our top priority.
items.aBody: CareTip utilizes industry-leading security practices and partners exclusively with payment processors that meet the highest PCI-DSS compliance standards. All card data is handled directly and securely by our partners; we never store full card numbers on our servers.

items.q: What does it cost my business?
items.aLead: Total transparency from day one, with absolutely zero hidden fees.
items.aBody: Pricing depends entirely on the CareTip fee tier you choose. Standard, per-tip processing-style fees apply, which are clearly outlined on our Pricing page or in your specific agreement. There are never any hidden charges beyond what is explicitly disclosed at signup or checkout.

items.q: Can I use CareTip at multiple locations?
items.aLead: Yes, absolutely. CareTip is built to scale alongside your business.
items.aBody: Our higher tiers offer robust multi-location support and advanced administrative controls. Depending on your specific agreement, you can easily manage staff, custom QR codes, and permissions separated by each individual location.

items.q: How do QR codes work for staff?
items.aBody: Every employee, specific role, or shared team pool gets their own unique QR Code. Guests simply scan the code, select their tipping amount, and can optionally leave a personal review or feedback. You can display these codes anywhere that fits your workflow: printed on table tents, on staff badges, directly on receipts, or digitally on screens.

items.q: What if a guest disputes a charge?
items.aLead: Don't worry, we've got your back.
items.aBody: Card networks and banks handle payment disputes according to their standard regulatory rules. To help resolve any issues swiftly, we will share the necessary transaction details with the payment processors. If you ever face a specific case, our support team is right here to guide you through it and minimize the hassle for your business.

items.q: Do employees see tips in real time?
items.aLead: Yes, and it's a massive motivation booster.
items.aBody: CareTip can notify your employees instantly when a new tip arrives, depending on your specific dashboard settings and their device connectivity. While the exact delivery second may vary slightly based on network speeds and devices, the transparency is there from day one.

items.aLead: Yes, this feature is available in our advanced tiers.
items.aBody: While our basic plan is designed for getting started, business owners and authorized managers in our higher tiers can easily export reporting and financial data. If you require a full, comprehensive data export for compliance or specific accounting needs, our support team is right here to assist you.

items.aLead: We're here to help whenever you need us.
items.aBody: You can easily access our Help Center, browse our FAQs, or use the contact form on our website. We provide dedicated email support and aim to respond as quickly as possible during regular business hours. For immediate assistance, our Help Center also offers step-by-step guides to solve common issues instantly.

items.q: Do you offer a mobile app?
items.aBody: CareTip offers tailored mobile experiences built for your entire team. Employees can use our app to track their tips and performance on the go, while businesses get smart mobile tools to manage tipping workflows from anywhere. Availability may vary by platform; please check our dedicated Mobile App page for full details and downloads.

faq.ctaTitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for?
faq.ctaBody: No worries, our support team is right here to help.

realLife.title: How CareTip works in real life
realLife.s1Text: <bold>Customers scan the QR code on the vehicle, delivery notice, or parcel and tip in seconds. No app downloads, no cash needed.</bold>
realLife.s1Detail: Display your custom QR codes on delivery vans, handheld scanners, missed-delivery cards, or as stickers directly on the packages. The customer opens the tipping screen instantly in their mobile browser, picks an amount, and pays securely using their card or preferred digital wallet. Whether the tip is assigned straight to the individual driver or contributed to a depot-wide pool, your dashboard updates in real time. Operations managers can track performance and boost driver motivation, even during peak delivery seasons.
realLife.s1Alt: Logistics and delivery tipping at the doorstep with a QR code
realLife.s2Text: <bold>A quick scan at check-in or check-out, the perfect solution for concierge, bell, and housekeeping teams. Seamless and completely cashless.</bold>
realLife.s2Detail: Display your branded QR codes as countertop displays at the desk, on key card holders, or via a tablet link at reception. Guests can tip porters, the concierge, or housekeeping effortlessly, without hunting for spare cash or dealing with awkward tip envelopes. Finance sees every single transaction tracked in one central hub, making shift handovers and month-end reporting far simpler for hotel management.
realLife.s2Alt: Hotel reception with guest tipping at check-in or check-out
realLife.s3Text: <bold>A quick scan at the exhibition booth or guest check-in, the ultimate solution for hostesses, promoters, and event crews. Mobile, professional, and cashless.</bold>
realLife.s3Detail: Display your branded QR codes as sleek counter displays, print them onto event badges, or show them directly on a smartphone screen. Clients and event visitors can reward outstanding service, welcoming hospitality, or great support instantly, without needing cash. Agencies and project managers track every tip live in one central dashboard, making post-event accounting completely transparent while giving your crew a powerful motivation boost for every shift.
realLife.s4Headline: On the Go, Right at the Door
realLife.s4Text: <bold>Tip from anywhere via link or QR code, the ultimate solution for field services, home care, and mobile beauty. Seamless, instant, and completely cash-free.</bold>
realLife.s4Detail: Send a personal tipping link via SMS or WhatsApp right after the job, or print a compact QR code on your business cards. Customers can reward great service from the comfort of their couch, even if your business doesn't have a physical storefront. Your field crew stays highly motivated because their appreciation lands in the exact same system as your in-venue staff.
realLife.s4Alt: Home and mobile service tipping moment

paymentsTrust.title: Trusted & Secure Payment Infrastructure
paymentsTrust.subtitle: CareTip is your reliable platform for digital tipping. All payments are processed securely via our partner Stripe. CareTip never stores any sensitive card details.
paymentsTrust.principle: CareTip manages the tips, Stripe secures the payment.
paymentsTrust.visualAlt: CareTip payment terminal with secure contactless card at checkout
paymentsTrust.cardBackLine2: CareTip never stores card numbers or CVV codes.
paymentsTrust.cardBackBullet1: Stripe Checkout · Apple Pay · Google Pay
paymentsTrust.cardBackBullet2: CareTip routes tips, never stores card data
paymentsTrust.cardBackDisclaimer: Not a bank-issued card · payment visualization
paymentsTrust.b1Text: Credit card, Apple Pay, and Google Pay via the familiar Stripe guest checkout your customers already know.
paymentsTrust.b2Text: CareTip records every tip for your team; Stripe secures the guest payment.
paymentsTrust.b3Text: Each Stripe payment links to a tip in CareTip, with clear records for managers and staff.
paymentsTrust.b4Text: Sensitive card data stays with Stripe. CareTip never stores card numbers or CVV codes.

socialProof.title: Trusted by teams on the floor
socialProof.subtitle: Hospitality leaders who wanted less friction and more clarity at closeout.
socialProof.testimonialsSubtitle: Real feedback from hospitality and service leaders using CareTip on the floor.
socialProof.q1Quote: We put QR codes on the tables and guests actually use them. We were live before dinner service the same day we signed up.
socialProof.q2Quote: My team checks tips between clients now. It is a small change, but the mood on the floor is noticeably better.
socialProof.q3Quote: Closing used to mean chasing cash envelopes. Tips show up where they should, and I can share clear numbers with the team.

assistant.title: Ask CareTip
assistant.subtitle: Product guide
assistant.welcome: Ask me anything about CareTip: setup, QR tipping, dashboards, payouts, or pricing. I remember our chat, so follow-ups work naturally.
assistant.error: Could not reach the assistant. Try again in a moment.
assistant.knowledgeFallbackNotice: Using knowledge base responses while AI services are temporarily unavailable.

recognition.title: Empowering our everyday heroes
recognition.body: <bold>Caring is Tipping: Reward outstanding dedication right in the moment.</bold> Make tipping effortlessly simple and fuel every single shift with noticeable motivation, genuine appreciation, and well-deserved smiles. Because the people who keep our world moving deserve nothing less than the best.

motivation.title: Built for those who work hard every single day.
motivation.subtitle: Outstanding work should never go unnoticed. CareTip makes recognition visible in real time, for your team and your leadership.
motivation.point1: Guest thanks reach the people who earned them, while the shift is still fresh
motivation.point2: Leaders spot standout effort without end-of-shift spreadsheet hunts
motivation.point3: Visible appreciation keeps teams proud from one shift to the next

footer.brandBlurb: The digital tipping system for modern teams. QR codes, transparent tip tracking, and smart team analytics, united on one secure platform.

dashboard.dailyTipDistDescWeek: Tips per day (Mon to Sun, current week)
dashboard.needHelpDesc: Learn how to maximize your team's earnings and keep guests tipping smoothly.
dashboard.guidelinesDialogDesc: Practical steps to get your team set up and grow tips. This is a quick reference you can save or print for your staff room.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionOnboardLi1: Invite team members from <highlight>Team</highlight> using your business invite code or add them directly with name and role.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionOnboardLi2: Ask each staff member to complete their profile and confirm they can sign in to the employee dashboard.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionOnboardLi3: Deactivate former staff promptly so tips and QR codes stay accurate.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionPrintLi1: Open <highlight>QR codes</highlight> and download each staff member's branded QR.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionPrintLi2: Print on durable cards or tent cards; place them where guests naturally look (reception, tables, checkout).
dashboard.guidelinesSectionPrintLi3: Re-print when names or roles change so scans always match the right person.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionTipsLi1: Train staff to mention CareTip at key moments: end of service, checkout, or when guests thank them.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionTipsLi2: Keep QR codes visible and unobstructed; a quick "scan to tip" sign boosts completion rates.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionTipsLi3: Review your dashboard regularly, recognize top performers, and share feedback with the team.
dashboard.guidelinesFooter: A full PDF guideline may be added later; for now this page is your in-app reference.

notifications.subtitle: Updates about tips, QR tools, and your CareTip account

1.title: Boost tips with branded QR cards
1.message: Print-ready QR packs help guests tip in seconds. Order from your dashboard or export PDFs for each team member.

2.title: Large tip received
2.message: A guest sent 50 € to your front-of-house team. Funds are processing through Stripe as a one-time payment.

3.title: Tip settled
3.message: A 12 € tip completed successfully. There is no subscription or invoice, just a single PaymentIntent.

4.title: Share staff tipping links
4.message: Each team member gets a personal link so regulars can tip them by name after great service.

5.title: New: instant tip notifications
5.message: Turn on push or email alerts when new tips land so your team can thank guests in the moment.

6.title: Weekly tip summary
6.message: You had 48 successful tips this week. Open Tips & activity for a full breakdown by employee.
